name: Builder Demo #1 - First Rib Bridge

tutorial.primaryLesson: Assign one right-facing Builder at the gold build line to create the first six-piece rib bridge over a narrow Styx gap.
jobHints: This is a mechanic demo, not a final puzzle: no blocker is required.
2: Builder should place six small bridge/stair pieces in the skeleton's facing direction, then resume walking.
The gold line marks the intended Builder test spot; the bridge should not exist until a Builder creates it.

notes: Current hardcoded prototype layout mirrors this file: spawn at x=220 moving right, left platform ends near x=800, landing begins at x=912, exit at x=1210. This is deliberately small so Builder mechanic #1 can be implemented and tested without blocker timing noise.
